$comment: CANONICAL PlayStudy design tokens — the single source of truth for brand, flavor, and mascot colors shared across web (PS-UI-WEB), mobile (playstudy-mb-ui), and any other client. Web generates CSS custom properties from this via `npm run gen:tokens`; mobile generates a Dart constants file via `dart run tool/gen_tokens.dart`. Edit colors HERE, then re-run both generators — never hand-edit the generated files. `hsl` is the web representation (H S% L%); `hex` is the mobile/Flutter representation. Keep the two in sync for the same swatch.

mascot.$comment: Pip the pup palette — used identically by the SVG logo (web) and the canvas/Flutter mascot drawings.
